title: ainsliaea apteroides
intro: Ainsliaea apteroides, also known as the Ainsliaea or Japanese mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Ainsliaea apteroides are believed to include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as improved digestion and reduced inflammation. Ainsliaea apteroides is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
